func NewContentFactory(h *HugoSites) ContentFactory {
	return ContentFactory{
		h:	h,
		shortcodeReplacerPre: strings.NewReplacer(
			"{{<", "{x{<",
			"{{%", "{x{%",
			">}}", ">}x}",
			"%}}", "%}x}"),
		shortcodeReplacerPost: strings.NewReplacer(
			"{x{<", "{{<",
			"{x{%", "{{%",
			">}x}", ">}}",
			"%}x}", "%}}"),
	}
}
